zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Buckingham於1176年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾時，她的父親Walter de Bolebec - Earl of Buckingham36歲，母親Sibil de Vesci35歲。她與Sir Richard Wallace Laird of Riccarton結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1204年在英國蘇格蘭享年28歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret de Buckingham于1176年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾时，她的父亲Walter de Bolebec - Earl of Buckingham36岁，母亲Sibil de Vesci35岁。她与Sir Richard Wallace Laird of Riccarton结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1204年在英国苏格兰享年28岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Buckingham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from the former county seat of the county of Buckinghamshire, Old English Buccingahamm ‘water meadow (Old English hamm) of the people of (-inga-) Bucc(a)’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Buckingham was born in 1176, in Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, Walter de Bolebec - Earl of Buckingham, was 36 and her mother, Sibil de Vesci, was 35. She married Sir Richard Wallace Laird of Riccarton. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1204, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 28.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Buckingham est née en 1176, à Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Walter de Bolebec - Earl of Buckingham, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Sibil de Vesci, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Wallace Laird of Riccarton. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1204, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 28 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret de Buckingham 1176 in Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter de Bolebec - Earl of Buckingham 36 und ihre Mutter Sibil de Vesci 35. Sie hat Sir Richard Wallace Laird of Riccarton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1204 im Alter von 28 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Buckingham è nata il nel 1176 nel Ayrshire, Scotland, sua padre, Walter de Bolebec - Earl of Buckingham, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Sibil de Vesci, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard Wallace Laird of Riccarton. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1204, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 28 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Buckinghamが1176年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Walter de Bolebec - Earl of Buckinghamは36歳，母Sibil de Vesciは35歳であった。Sir Richard Wallace Laird of Riccartonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1204年にイギリススコットランドで28歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Buckingham(이)가 1176년 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter de Bolebec - Earl of Buckingham(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sibil de Vesci(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 Sir Richard Wallace Laird of Riccarton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1204년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 28세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Buckingham nasceu em 1176, em Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Walter de Bolebec - Earl of Buckingham, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Sibil de Vesci, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Wallace Laird of Riccarton. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1204, em Escócia, United Kingdom, com 28 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Buckingham родилась в 1176 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Walter de Bolebec - Earl of Buckingham было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibil de Vesci, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Wallace Laird of Riccarton. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1204 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 28 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret de Buckingham nació en 1176, en Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Walter de Bolebec - Earl of Buckingham, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Sibil de Vesci, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Sir Richard Wallace Laird of Riccarton. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1204, en Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 28 años.
